de.uka.ilkd.key.gui

Class InvariantConfigurator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.InvariantConfigurator

  • public class InvariantConfigurator
extends Object
    Author:
    Dreiner, bruns This class creates a Dialog to input a loop Invariant, Variant and Modifies.

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static InvariantConfigurator getInstance()
        Returns the single Instance of this class

      • getLoopInvariant

        public LoopInvariant getLoopInvariant(LoopInvariant loopInv,
                             Services services,
                             boolean requiresVariant,
                             List<LocationVariable> heapContext)
                               throws RuleAbortException
        Creates a Dialog. User can enter Invariant, Variant and Modifies clause. The Input is parsed and a new LoopInvariant is returned. In Case of a parser Exception an error-message is shown.
        Parameters:
        loopInv -
        services -
        Returns:
        LoopInvariant
        Throws:
        RuleAbortException
